name: Dexamethasone
description: I-corticosteroid yokwenziwa ixesha elide. Isetyenziselwa i-edema ye-cerebral (i-high altitude cerebral edema - i-HACE, i-TBI), ukuguquguquka okukhulu, i-edema ye-airway, kunye ne-adrenal crisis. Anti-ukudumba, hayi anabolic.
indications: I-Cerebral edema evela kwi-tumor okanye ithumba
dose: I-Cerebral edema / HACE: 8-10 mg IV / IM yokuqala, emva koko 4 mg q6h. Airway edema: 10 mg IV kanye. I-Croup: 0.6 mg / kg IM / PO (ubuninzi be-16mg). Ingxaki yeAdrenal: 4 mg IV.
window: I-HACE: Nikeza kwangethuba kunye nokwehla ngoko nangoko.
contraindications: Ugonyo lwentsholongwane ephilayo ngaphakathi kweentsuku ezingama-30 (isalamane)
warnings: Ayithathi indawo yokwehla kunye neoksijini ye-HACE -- sebenzisa njengesihlomelo kuphela.
Idosi enye yeemeko ezingxamisekileyo ngokubanzi ikhuselekile kakhulu.

pediatric.dose: I-Croup: 0.6 mg / kg PO / IM (ubuninzi be-16 mg). I-Cerebral edema: 0.5-1 mg / kg IV (max 10 mg). I-edema yomoya: 0.5 mg / kg IV.

obstetric.note: I-12 mg IM q24h x 2 iidosi ezisetyenziselwa ukukhawulezisa ukukhula kwemiphunga yomntwana kwiiveki ezingama-24-34 zokumitha ekubelekeni kwangaphambi kwexesha. Xoxa nomboneleli ophezulu okhoyo.

source: JTS CPG / Wilderness Medicine / Standard Emergency Pharmacology
